name: Merrymount Lobster or Seafood
recipeIngredient: 3 cups lobster, crab, shrimp, or sea legs, cut up
1 cup buttered cracker crumbs, saltines may be used
recipeInstructions:
1. Lobster may be frozen, canned, or fresh.
2. Sprinkle lemon juice and beaten eggs over lobster.
3. Bring cream, butter, and bread crumbs just to a boil; stir well together and pour over lobster.
4. Stir mustard, cayenne pepper, black pepper, and salt carefully into lobster mixture.
5. Pour into a buttered casserole dish and top with 1 cup buttered cracker crumbs.
6. Bake, uncovered, in a preheated oven at 350°F until crumbs are brown and lobster is bubbly.
